invariant: Daily readiness partitions all composed child inputs by workspace_scope before the narrative prompt boundary.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = ws-alpha output and prompt inputs contain Account Alpha facts only. FAIL = any ws-beta subject text or source enters ws-alpha risk fields or narrative.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds two workspaces with same-day meetings and tracked account subjects so a reader must partition by workspace_scope.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: Expected get_daily_readiness domain output for ws-alpha; beta-only text is listed as an explicit absence assertion.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Synthetic canonical replay key for the workspace-partition daily readiness narrative.
